name: SmartHR
description: Japans leading cloud HR and labor management platform with open APIs for payroll and workflow automation.

seo.title: SmartHR — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: SmartHR: Japans leading cloud HR and labor management platform with open APIs for payroll and workflow automation.

when_to_use: Cloud HR automation for Japanese labor compliance reporting
Payroll workflow connected to accounting via SmartHR API
Employee onboarding automation from hire to system setup
Open API integration linking SmartHR with Slack and Kintone
Performance review and HR process automation for JP enterprises

pros: Clean UI that even HR teams enjoy
Deep integration with Japanese payroll vendors
cons: API rate limits tight on free tiers
review.verdict: The no-brainer HR platform if you employ people in Japan; irrelevant anywhere else.
review.best_for: Japanese companies and foreign firms with Japan-based employees needing local compliance
review.not_for: Companies outside Japan or without Japanese payroll obligations
